Hero.title: Learn what matters to you
Hero.description: Mezonly connects learners with vetted tutors across languages, school subjects, and more. Book 1-on-1 lessons, chat, and join live rooms directly on Mezon — study whenever it fits your day.
Hero.trust: Trusted by learners and tutors across Vietnam

schedule.title: When works for you?
schedule.label: Flexible scheduling
schedule.description: Pick times that fit your day — morning, midday, evening, or a short window between tasks.

mezon.title: Your classroom on Mezon
mezon.label: Built on Mezon
mezon.description: Chat, voice and live lesson rooms — all in one app.

pricing.title: Try first, decide later
pricing.label: Pay per lesson
pricing.description: No subscription, no commitment. Top-up only when you want.

verified.title: Tutors you can trust
verified.label: Verified tutors
verified.description: ID-checked, interviewed and reviewed — every single one.

Stats.title: Built for learners who don't waste time
Stats.description: A tutor matching platform built for real schedules — learn when it works for you.

HowItWorks.title: Three steps to your next lesson
HowItWorks.description: From your first search to your first class — designed to fit a busy schedule.

step1.title: Find the right tutor
step1.description: Filter by subject, level, price, and availability. See video intros and real reviews from other learners.

step2.title: Book a trial lesson
step2.description: Choose a slot that fits your routine any day of the week. Pay securely per lesson, no subscription required.

step3.title: Learn live on Mezon
step3.description: Chat, share files and join your video classroom directly on Mezon. Everything in one place.

FeaturedTutors.title: Learn from people who get it
FeaturedTutors.description: Subject experts, certified teachers, and bilingual mentors — all reviewed and verified.

WhyUs.title: Built for working adults
WhyUs.description: Busy students and working adults use Mezonly to keep learning without putting life on hold.

evening.title: Flexible scheduling
evening.description: Book lessons when it suits you — daytime breaks, after work, or any quiet moment in your week.

payPerLesson.title: Pay per lesson
payPerLesson.description: No long contracts. Try a 30-minute trial first, top-up only when you want more.

verified.title: 100% verified tutors
verified.description: Every tutor is interviewed and ID-checked. Read transparent reviews from real students.

mezon.title: Native Mezon integration
mezon.description: Chat, share homework and join live rooms with your tutor on Mezon — no extra app to install.

personalized.title: Personalized roadmap
personalized.description: Tell us your goal — exams, languages, STEM, or skills for work — and we match you with tutors who specialize in it.

moneyBack.title: Trial money-back
moneyBack.description: Didn't click with your tutor? Get your trial lesson refunded, no questions asked.

MezonShowcase.title: Your classroom lives on Mezon
MezonShowcase.description: Mezonly handles matching, booking and payments. Mezon handles real conversation — chat, voice and live video rooms with your tutor, all in one place.

chat.title: Chat anytime
chat.description: Message your tutor between lessons for quick questions or feedback.

rooms.title: Live video rooms
rooms.description: Join the lesson with one click — HD video, screen share and whiteboard.

files.title: Share homework
files.description: Upload assignments, audio recordings and PDFs straight into the chat.

preview.incoming: See you at 8pm! Don't forget today's vocab list 📚

Testimonials.title: Real stories from real students
Testimonials.description: Working professionals who finally found a way to keep learning.

review1.name: Trang Nguyen
review1.quote: I work until 7pm every day, so most schools weren't an option. With Mezonly I learn at 9pm twice a week — my speaking improved more in 3 months than 2 years at a center.

review2.name: Hung Le
review2.quote: Booking is two clicks, everything happens on Mezon, and I can pay per lesson. Exactly what I wanted as someone who hates long-term contracts.

review3.name: Phuong Vu
review3.quote: My tutor matches my goal perfectly — business English for client calls. The video rooms on Mezon feel like sitting next to her.

BecomeTutor.title: Teach on your own schedule.
BecomeTutor.titleHighlight: Get paid for what you love.
BecomeTutor.description: Bilingual student, English major or certified teacher? Build your tutor profile in 10 minutes and start earning the first week. Mezonly handles bookings and payments — you focus on teaching.

benefits.tools: Built-in tools — chat, video room and whiteboard on Mezon
benefits.schedule: Set your own hours — teach as little as 5h / week

Cta.title: Your first lesson is on us
Cta.description: Book a 30-minute trial lesson for free with any tutor on Mezonly. No subscription, no credit card needed.

Features.title: Learning Built for Busy People
Features.description: Flexible sessions, practical tools, and a tutoring format designed for modern schedules.

eveningClasses.title: Sessions that fit your day
eveningClasses.description: Pick lesson times that match your focus and calendar — morning, midday, or evening.

flexibleWeekends.title: Any day you are free
flexibleWeekends.description: Book when a slot opens up in your week — not only on weekends.

learnViaMezon.title: Learn via Mezon
learnViaMezon.description: Join classes in one place with messaging, files, and tutor support.

Seamless.title: A Seamless Learning Experience
Seamless.description: Everything you need to learn effectively in one integrated environment.

virtualClassroom.title: Virtual Classroom
virtualClassroom.description: Live sessions with whiteboard, materials, and tutor guidance in real time.

instantMessaging.title: Instant Messaging
instantMessaging.description: Chat with tutors quickly for feedback, follow-ups, and study support.
